title: Redcliffe Labs appoints Dr Sonal Saxena as Director – Lab Operations
summary: Appointment to lead laboratory operations and accreditation standards across India network
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
Appointment to lead laboratory operations and accreditation standards across India network

Redcliffe Labs has appointed Dr Sonal Saxena as Director – Lab Operations, effective immediately.

With this appointment, the responsibility of overseeing diagnostics across its network will be led under her role.

Dr Saxena will lead the organisation’s laboratory operations across India, focusing on technical processes, quality systems, and accreditation standards. Her role will include strengthening the company’s diagnostics delivery and expanding its operational network.

Dr Saxena has over 25 years of experience in pathology and laboratory medicine. Her experience includes clinical diagnostics, reference laboratory establishment, and operational leadership. She has held roles at organisations including Dr Lal PathLabs, Apollo Clinic, Alchemist Hospital, and Diagno Labs. As an ISO 15189 assessor, she has been involved in achieving NABL, CAP, and ISO accreditations in previous roles.

Commenting on the appointment, Aditya Kandoi, Founder and CEO, Redcliffe Labs, said; “Diagnostics is evolving rapidly to become the first step in proactive healthcare. At Redcliffe Labs, we are committed to setting new benchmarks in quality and accessibility. I am happy to welcome Dr. Sonal Saxena to our leadership team. Her vast experience in lab operations and accreditation will be invaluable as we continue to expand our footprint and deliver trusted diagnostics to millions, ensuring healthier lives.”

Dr Sonal Saxena added, “Redcliffe Labs is playing a pivotal role in shifting the narrative towards preventive healthcare. Backed by a strong network of 80+ labs and 2200+ collection centres across 220+ cities, I look forward to further enhancing our lab capabilities and processes to support early detection, improve health outcomes, and deliver a seamless diagnostic experience to every individual we serve.”

She has previously worked with organisations such as Dr. Lal Path Labs, Apollo Clinic, Alchemist Hospital, and Diagno Labs.
